case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SF TAX COLLECTOR VS. CORCORAN OWL

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $4,957.47 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT OWL, CORCORAN

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-25-2012 - JUDGMENT.
